name: Shop Rent
description: Monthly rent paid for the grocery store premises

name: Electricity Bills
description: Electricity charges for lighting, refrigeration, and daily operations

name: Internet and WiFi
description: Broadband and internet expenses for business operations

name: Employee Salaries
description: Monthly salaries and wages paid to store employees

name: Transportation
description: Expenses incurred for goods transportation and deliveries

name: Fuel Expenses
description: Fuel costs for delivery vehicles and business transportation

name: Equipment Maintenance
description: Repair and maintenance costs for store equipment and machinery

name: Cleaning Supplies
description: Expenses for cleaning products and store sanitation

name: Packaging Materials
description: Costs of bags, boxes, labels, and packaging materials

name: Marketing and Advertising
description: Promotional campaigns, banners, and advertising expenses

name: Software Subscriptions
description: POS systems, accounting software, and other business tools

name: Office Supplies
description: Stationery, printer paper, and administrative supplies

name: Bank Charges
description: Transaction fees, service charges, and banking expenses

name: Licenses and Permits
description: Business registration, permits, and compliance-related fees

name: Insurance
description: Business, inventory, and property insurance premiums

name: Water Bills
description: Water utility charges for daily store operations

name: Security Services
description: Expenses for security guards, CCTV monitoring, and safety measures

name: Staff Welfare
description: Refreshments, uniforms, and employee welfare expenses

name: Miscellaneous Expenses
description: Small operational expenses not covered under other categories

name: Inventory Loss and Damage
description: Losses due to spoilage, breakage, or damaged inventory
